entity.summary: Fully on-chain trading platform and Layer-1 exchange ecosystem whose HyperCore component provides perpetual futures and spot order books with transparent on-chain order, trade, cancellation, and liquidation execution.
entity.notes: HEI models Hyperliquid, Hyperliquid Spot, and the spot-orderbook discovery row as one exchange entity. Current first-party documentation describes HyperCore as supporting fully on-chain perpetual futures and spot order books, with every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation executed transparently on the L1.

evidence.title: About Hyperliquid
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Hyperliquid as an L1 built for an on-chain financial system and states that HyperCore includes fully on-chain perpetual futures and spot order books.

evidence.title: Hyperliquid Trading documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading documentation covers perpetual assets, order books, order types, margining, funding, liquidations, market making, and related live trading functions.

evidence.title: Hyperliquid official trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading application remains available as the public exchange entry point.
